zh.lifeSummary: 當Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil於1120年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓時，他的父親Evrard de Breteuil II25歲，母親Béatrix de Coucy19歲。他於大約1142年與Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil于1120年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓时，他的父亲Evrard de Breteuil II25岁，母亲Béatrix de Coucy19岁。他于大约1142年与Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Valeran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Julio, Luis, Ramon, Carlos, Manuel, Marina, Pablo, Alberto, Alejandro, Alonso.  Italian Lorenzo, Antonio, Elio, Giraldo, Angelo, Caesar, Ciro, Clemente, Heriberto, Ireneo, Silvano, Tarcisio.
Spanish: habitational name from Valera in Cuenca province and possibly also from a place with the same name in Badajoz.
Italian (mainly Lombardy): habitational name from any of the places called Valera, for example Valera Fratta in Lodi province.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: From the French form of the Latin name Valeria, feminine of Valerius, an old Roman family name apparently derived from valere ‘to be healthy, strong’. The name owes its popularity as a male name in France to the cult of a 3rd-century saint who was converted to Christianity by Martial of Limoges. The masculine form Valery is found occasionally in England in the 16th century, but by the 17th century had fallen into disuse.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil was born in 1120, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Evrard de Breteuil II, was 25 and his mother, Béatrix de Coucy, was 19. He married Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny about 1142. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1162, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil est né en 1120, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Evrard de Breteuil II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Coucy, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny environ 1142. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1162, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil 1120 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Evrard de Breteuil II 25 und seine Mutter Béatrix de Coucy 19. Er hat um 1142 Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1162 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil è nato il nel 1120 nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Evrard de Breteuil II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Béatrix de Coucy, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny circa 1142. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1162, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Breteuil, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France: フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトン
ja.lifeSummary: Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuilが1120年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンで生まれた時，父Evrard de Breteuil IIは25歳，母Béatrix de Coucyは19歳であった。約1142年にHoldeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil(이)가 1120년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Evrard de Breteuil II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrix de Coucy(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1142년 Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil nasceu em 1120, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Evrard de Breteuil II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Coucy, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny aproximadamente 1142. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1162, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil родился в 1120 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Evrard de Breteuil II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Coucy, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny около 1142 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1162 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Valeran III Seigneur de Breteuil nació en 1120, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Evrard de Breteuil II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Coucy, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Holdeburge Dame of Ailly-sur-Noye and Tartigny aproximadamente 1142. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1162, a la edad de 42 años.
